text: IDF 98th Division COMPLETES encirclement of Bint Jbeil — 100+ Hezbollah killed in CQC. Paratroopers, Commando, Givati Brigades. Hundreds of weapons seized. Only 'several dozen' fighters remain. text: Oil PULLING BACK from April 13 highs. Brent $98.05 (from $101.82 close), WTI $96.57 (from $98.00). Trump signals Iran 'wants to work a deal' — easing prices.
